column1: # grep-tells.tsv — TIER 1 (flat-presence) rules for audit-swiftui-api-currency (curr-01 … curr-14).
# severity: hard | warn | adv   (hard → runner exits 2). The runner greps each ERE over the target *.swift.
# This LOCATES only — the LLM agent READS each hit (SKILL.md step 3) and decides. Structural rules that
# grep cannot express (1-param onChange closure shape, inline NavigationLink inside List) live in

column4: HALLUCINATED API (does not exist on iOS) → .glassEffect()/GlassEffectContainer/.buttonStyle(.glass)/.clipShape(). Confirm with swiftui-ctx lookup exit-3.
NavigationView is deprecated (iOS 13.0–26.5) → NavigationStack / NavigationSplitView. Structural migration: cross_ref adaptive-navigation.
onChange present — READ the closure: a SINGLE-param { newValue in } is the deprecated 1-param form (introduced iOS 14.0, deprecated iOS 17.0) → (old, new) or 0-param. ast-grep narrows the shape.
.tabItem is the legacy builder → Tab("…", systemImage:) { } (iOS 18). Structural: cross_ref adaptive-navigation.
NavigationLink with destination: — if INSIDE a List/ForEach it eagerly builds every destination → .navigationDestination(for:). ast-grep confirms containment.
Text + Text concatenation deprecated (iOS 26.0, closes early) → interpolation / AttributedString. Craft: cross_ref typography-text.
DispatchQueue.main.async — if the file otherwise uses async/await it is a GCD cargo-cult → @MainActor / await MainActor.run. READ to confirm. cross_ref async-data.
3-arg dropDestination(for:action:isTargeted:) deprecated (iOS 26.5) → dropDestination(for:isEnabled:action:). cross_ref document-picker-permissions. VERIFY successor signature.
MagnificationGesture/RotationGesture renamed (iOS 26.5) → MagnifyGesture/RotateGesture (fix_mode: auto). cross_ref touch-gestures.
Font.system(_:design:) — if it passes NO weight: the design-only form is deprecated (iOS 26.5) → Font.system(_:design:weight:). READ to confirm. cross_ref typography-text.
